description: serviconnect-class regression-guard. Supabase auth.signUp() called with options.data containing user-controlled `role` from request body — stored as user_metadata, may be used by RLS policies. Attacker POSTs {role: 'admin'} → user_metadata.role = admin → potential RLS bypass. After F-MASS-1 scanner detects the supabase.auth.signUp options.data sensitive-field flow.
